title: Cleanup Pull Message
body:
Currently the pull message on failure is UGLY. This patch removes a lot of the noice when pulling an image from multiple registries to make the user experience better. Our current messages are way too verbose and need to be dampened down. Still has verbose mode if you turn on log-level=debug. Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh Currently if pull ubi8 in fedora you see: ``` $ podman pull ubi8 Trying to pull docker.io/library/ubi8... ERRO[0000] Error pulling image ref //ubi8:latest: Error initializing source docker://ubi8:latest: Error reading manifest latest in docker.io/library/ubi8: errors: denied: requested access to the resource is denied unauthorized: authentication required Failed Trying to pull registry.fedoraproject.org/ubi8... ERRO[0001] Error pulling image ref //registry.fedoraproject.org/ubi8:latest: Error initializing source docker://registry.fedoraproject.org/ubi8:latest: Error reading manifest latest in registry.fedoraproject.org/ubi8: manifest unknown: manifest unknown Failed Trying to pull quay.io/ubi8... ERRO[0002] Error pulling image ref //quay.io/ubi8:latest: Error initializing source docker://quay.io/ubi8:latest: Error reading manifest latest in quay.io/ubi8: error parsing HTTP 404 response body: invalid character '<' looking for beginning of value: "\n404 Not Found\n

Not Found

\n

The requested URL was not found on the server. If you entered the URL manually please check your spelling and try again.

\n" Failed Trying to pull registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8... Getting image source signatures Copying blob c5e6e6f6022a skipped: already exists Copying blob 08b029248887 skipped: already exists Copying config 1a2a4fce03 done Writing manifest to image destination Storing signatures 1a2a4fce03697e74648ba88fcf548b8fa7f1e27a9c6aaf7b2f319efae51e75b5 ``` After this patch it looks like: ``` ./bin/podman pull ubi8 Trying to pull docker.io/library/ubi8... denied: requested access to the resource is denied Trying to pull registry.fedoraproject.org/ubi8... manifest unknown: manifest unknown Trying to pull quay.io/ubi8... error parsing HTTP 404 response body: invalid character '<' looking for beginning of value: "\n404 Not Found\n

Not Found

\n

The requested URL was not found on the server. If you entered the URL manually please check your spelling and try again.

\n" Trying to pull registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8... Getting image source signatures Copying blob 08b029248887 skipped: already exists Copying blob c5e6e6f6022a skipped: already exists Copying config 1a2a4fce03 done Writing manifest to image destination Storing signatures 1a2a4fce03697e74648ba88fcf548b8fa7f1e27a9c6aaf7b2f319efae51e75b5 ```

LGTM and really nice user experience change @rhatdan
Do enough demos of this, and finally get off my ass to fix it.
